summary: Adjusted the opening paragraph to connect more directly from chapter 4's lie aftermath while shifting away from a time-first scaffold that would echo chapter 6's opening. No exit change was needed.
edits: Reframed the opening around the lie's aftertaste and Beni entering the flat, improving continuity from chapter 4.
Moved the forty-minute timing detail later in the opening so chapter 5 no longer begins with the same timed setup shape as chapter 6.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example lines; none appeared verbatim in the chapter.
